$comment: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for the Fire Editor wire protocol. Both editor/fire_editor/_generated.py and editor/extension/src/protocol/generated.ts are produced from this file by codegen.py. Never hand-edit the generated files. Bump protocol_version on ANY incompatible change and regenerate both bindings in the same commit (EDITOR_PRD hard rule 6).

hello.doc: Handshake. Client announces its protocol_version; daemon rejects on mismatch.

world.open.doc: Open a world by seed or save file. Resets the editor session. Exactly one of seed/save_path.

world.save.doc: Save the current editor session to a .ta save file (terrain deltas).

chunks.set_center.doc: Set the editor camera center; daemon streams chunk meshes (binary MESH frames) for the surrounding region and unloads far chunks.

terrain.raycast.doc: Cast a ray through the voxel field; returns the first solid hit or null.

terrain.brush.doc: Apply a brush edit at a world point. shape: sphere|box|cylinder; mode: add|remove. Dirty chunks remesh+relight and stream back as MESH frames. Pushed onto the undo stack.

edit.undo.doc: Undo the most recent edit; affected chunks remesh and stream back.

edit.redo.doc: Redo the most recently undone edit.

scene.tree.doc: Full authoring hierarchy: a flat, depth-first list of object dicts (id, name, kind, parent, position, rotation, scale).

scene.create.doc: Create a placeable object. kind: empty|cube|sphere|light|spawn. Optional parent id and spawn position. Broadcasts scene.changed.

scene.reparent.doc: Move an object under a new parent (omit parent for a root). Rejects cycles. Broadcasts scene.changed.

scene.set_transform.doc: Set an object's local transform (any omitted component is left unchanged). Broadcasts scene.changed.

scene.delete.doc: Delete an object and all its descendants. Broadcasts scene.changed.

log.doc: Daemon -> client log line, surfaced in the extension output channel.

chunk.ready.doc: A MESH binary frame (payload_id) for chunk (cx,cy,cz) is being sent.

chunk.unload.doc: Chunk (cx,cy,cz) left the streamed region; client should drop its geometry.

edit.state.doc: Editor dirty/undo state changed (drives the dirty indicator + undo/redo enablement).

scene.changed.doc: The authoring hierarchy changed (create/rename/reparent/delete/transform). Carries the full object list so the tree view and viewport can refresh.
